query:
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, loginMethod, role, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn)
VALUES ('admin-zuodi-001', 'Admin', 'admin@zuodi.com', 'manual', 'admin', NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
role = 'admin',
updatedAt = NOW(),
lastSignedIn = NOW();

INSERT INTO product_series (name, nameEn, code, slug, description, sortOrder, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES 
  ('黎明', 'Dawn', 'DAWN', 'dawn', '现代办公座椅系列', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('杰瑞', 'Jerry', 'JERRY', 'jerry', '人体工学办公椅', 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('光芒', 'Sunshine', 'SUNSHINE', 'sunshine', '会议桌系列', 2, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('诺拉', 'Neola', 'NEOLA', 'neola', '学生课桌系列', 3, 1, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
name = VALUES(name),
nameEn = VALUES(nameEn),
description = VALUES(description),
updatedAt = NOW();

INSERT INTO product_categories (name, slug, type, description, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  ('座椅', 'seating', 'office', '办公座椅', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('办公会议桌', 'desks-tables', 'office', '办公桌和会议桌', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('存储', 'storage', 'office', '存储柜和架子', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('空间支持', 'space-solutions', 'office', '空间解决方案', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
name = VALUES(name),
description = VALUES(description),
updatedAt = NOW();
